/home/calvi/pspdev/bin/psp-g++ -I/home/calvi/pspdev/psp/include -I/home/calvi/pspdev/psp/sdk/include -DPSP -g -O0 -g -L/home/calvi/pspdev/lib -L/home/calvi/pspdev/psp/lib -L/home/calvi/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib -Wl,-zmax-page-size=128 -specs=/home/calvi/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/prxspecs -Wl,-q,-T/home/calvi/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/linkfile.prx /home/calvi/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/prxexports.o CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/AttackCommand.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/Character.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/Command.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/CommandRegistry.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/InputHandler.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/Menu.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/MovementComponent.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/UIRender.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/Project_Crystallis.dir/src/main.cpp.obj -o Project_Crystallis  -lpspgu -lpspge -lpspdisplay -lpspdebug -lpspctrl
